narrative:
Scioto Township has 665 registered voters, with 58.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.0%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.9 percentage points.
